---
title: "Simulated data for research and development of Florida-scale record linkage software for cancer data systems"
author:
  - name: Your Name
    orcid: 0000-0000-0000-0000
    affiliations: [Institute for Health Metrics and Evaluation]
abstract: |
  **Introduction** … **Objectives** … **Methods** … **Results** … **Conclusions** …
keywords: [record linkage, synthetic data, cancer registry, entity resolution]
---

## Highlights
- …

# Introduction
…

# Methods

## Generating simulated records with pseudopeople

```{python}
#| echo: true
#| label: sample-demo
import pseudopeople as psp
census = psp.generate_decennial_census()   # bundled ~10k-simulant sample
census.head()
```

# Results

```{python}
#| label: load-results
import json, pandas as pd
# sizes = pd.read_csv("results/file_sizes.csv")
# err   = json.load(open("results/error_rates.json"))
sizes = pd.DataFrame({'rows': [10,20,30]})
err = dict(first_name_pct=5)
```

The Florida-scale extract contains `{python} f"{int(sizes['rows'].sum()):,}"` records across
`{python} len(sizes)` files, with a first-name error rate of `{python} err['first_name_pct']`%.
